examples: That's why we establish or reestablish connection by greeting strangers and friends with a handshake.
When an outbreak of CoT starfish occurs, they thin out the fast-growing coral and may give the slower ones a chance to reestablish.
How do we reestablish moral standards?
You tell us: Should the U.S. reestablish a formal link between the dollar and gold?
Neither will we reestablish the industrial base to build more than a handful of weapons.
